title: Can anything be done? Please help.
body:
This girl who has became very dear to me just told me a few days ago that 2 years ago she was diagnosed with small cell carcinoma lung cancer and that she was given 8 months to live, but 2 years later she’s still here. It was first diagnosed in the bottom of her right lung then it spread to the entire right lung and her kidneys. 

last week in her newest scan she was told it spread to her left lung and said it was spreading to her stomach too. The doctor asked if she wanted to know how much time she had left and she said no which I just know is a bad sign. I’m freaking out on the inside and have been panicking and crying so much since the second she told me about it. I’ve been doing research and haven’t seen nothing good on this aggressive POS cancer. 

I’m so desperate to help her get better I’m about to just get her all these things people claim can help since trying doesn’t hurt. I don’t know what I could do so I’m just praying and I’m going to get her things like soursop leaf for teas, black seed oil, apricot kernels, turkey tail mushroom, chaga mushroom, beets, moringa, curcumin, etc. and have her do things like go in saunas. Please give me any advice on something that can possibly help whether it has a lot of scientific back up or not just tell me anything I’m begging.

I heard about Joe Tippens story and his success with fenbendazole but I don’t want to make her even more sick by giving her animal medicine. I’m desperate and would want her to try it but I don’t want to shorten her life by something I thought cold help it would kill me on the inside. I’ve seen a lot of people claim it helped them or someone they love but I’ve also seen a lot of people call it out for BS, I don’t know what to do I’m hurting so much right now she’s only 23 I was hoping we could really go somewhere together in life 💔
